VaultWares Brand Guide
EN / FR

VaultWares

Privacy first. Security in service. Functionality for everyone.

La confidentialité d'abord. La sécurité au service. La fonctionnalité pour tous.

v1.0 Enterprise Guidelines
Solarized-inspired • Light & Dark

Brand Foundation

We build tools that respect people. VaultWares exists to prove privacy and usability are not trade-offs — they are prerequisites.

Mission

Create privacy-first technology that is secure by default, understandable by design, and accessible to everyone — in English and French.

1. Privacy

Data minimization. Local-first. No tracking.

2. Security

In service of people, never theatrics.

3. Functionality

For everyone. Clear, fast, bilingual.

Voice & Tone

We are

  • • Calm, clear, confident
  • • Human, not corporate
  • • Precise, not pretentious
  • • Bilingual by default

We avoid

  • • Fear-mongering
  • • "Hacker" clichés
  • • Jargon & acronyms
  • • Dark patterns

Tone in UI

  • • "Vault secured" not "Encrypted!"
  • • "Continue" not "Proceed"
  • • Explain, then act
  • • FR: "Continuer", not slang

Tailwind Config

export default {
  darkMode: 'class',
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        vault: {
          base: '#002B36',
          slate: '#4A5459',
          light: '#FDF6E3',
          cyan: '#21B8CC',
          green: '#4ECC21',
          gold: '#CC9B21',
          burgundy: '#A63D40',
        }
      },
      fontFamily: {
        sans: ['"Segoe UI Semilight"', '"Segoe UI"', 'Inter', 'system-ui']
      },
      borderRadius: { '3xl': '1.5rem', '4xl': '2rem' }
    }
  }
}

Typography

Display — 56/64
Privacy first.
Heading — 32/40
Security in service.
Body — 16/26

VaultWares uses Segoe UI Semilight as primary, with Inter as web fallback. Keep line-length 60–75ch, generous whitespace, and 1.6 line-height for readability in both English and French.

UI Label — 13/20 uppercase
FUNCTIONALITY FOR EVERYONE

Font Stack

font-family: "Segoe UI Semilight",
"Segoe UI", Inter,
system-ui, -apple-system,
"Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
Weight300–500
Tracking-0.01em headings
LanguagesEN • FR

Logo Usage

Do

• Maintain clear space = ½ logo height • Minimum 32px digital • Use on light (#FDF6E3) or dark (#002B36) only

Don't

Stretch
Recolor
Matrix FX

No gradients, glows, rotation, or "hacker" green treatments. VaultWares is calm and professional.

UI Principles

Tailwind CSS

Utility-first. Consistent spacing scale (4/8pt). No custom pixel nudging.

Radix / shadcn

Accessible primitives. No reinventing dialogs, dropdowns, or tooltips.

Glass UI — Sparingly

Blur 16-20px, 60% opacity max. Use for overlays, not entire pages.

No "Matrix" Style

Avoid black backgrounds, neon green, terminal fonts. We are not a hacker movie.

Clarity over Clever

4.5:1 contrast minimum. Bilingual strings same length consideration.

Whitespace

Generous padding. Content breathes. 64-128px section spacing desktop.

Application Examples

Vault — Web

Web App

Light glass sidebar, Solarized dark content.

VaultWares Desktop
Privacy first

Desktop

Native feel, subtle glass, no neon.

VaultWares
Extension

Browser Extension

32px icon, rounded, matches logo.

English + Français • Built-in

Every interface, error state, and onboarding flow ships with EN/FR parity. Design for 15–20% longer French strings. Avoid idioms. Use system locale, allow manual override.
